hero.subtitulo: The authentic Italian flavour in every scoop

pasion.texto:
Since 2013, we have dedicated ourselves to sweetening the special moments of our customers.

Every ice cream is prepared daily, guaranteeing unmatched freshness and flavour.

Because we believe the best memories are made with the best flavours.

productos.descripcion:
Over 20 creamy flavours prepared every day with fresh ingredients and authentic Italian recipes.

From classics like pistachio and stracciatella to unique flavours.

100% natural fruit ice pops with no added sugar, perfect for health-conscious customers, or our irresistible creamy ice pops with smooth textures that will take you to an Italian summer.

Freshness guaranteed in every bite.

Creamy milkshakes, natural fruit smoothies, refreshing Italian granitas, coffee frappés made with our freshly brewed coffee.

The perfect combination to accompany your ice cream or enjoy on their own.

Fluffy artisan Bubble Waffles, thin crêpes filled with Nutella or warm chocolates, golden waffles and fluffy pancakes.

All customisable with your favourite toppings.

caracteristicas.descripcion: We carefully select fresh fruits, top-quality pastes, nuts and the finest Italian products.
We use Italian artisan methods passed down from generation to generation.
Every season we create surprising new flavours that conquer palates.
We offer lactose-free, gluten-free and vegan options, because everyone deserves to indulge.

ubicacion.titulo: We're Waiting for You in the Heart of Málaga!
ubicacion.subtitulo: Open every day of the year
